content.body: Seems like a memory leak in meet has killed my browser, trying to recover.
Lost the local recording to a reboot (partial file was in /tmp) 😔

BTW, slides of my presentation is here https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1-AXcjt0W6VFsA10DkBitn2MRRKOUTqrW7fVqiQbA8ZI/edit?slide=id.g3965d76ffd6_0_41#slide=id.g3965d76ffd6_0_41. Also the PR I mentioned is this one https://github.com/tc39/proposal-deferred-reexports/pull/29
Thanks all for your time and sorry for missing the initial 15 min.
Not a major problem, but thank you for trying!
nicolo-ribaudo: there are only some very brief notes on the agenda, so it may be better to sync with Caio Lima for a summary of the meeting
